mapper.select: SELECT position_code FROM member_position WHERE member_id=#{memberId} ORDER BY priority_no
mapper.sql: SELECT m.*,COUNT(mp.match_player_id)::int match_count,COUNT(mp.match_player_id) FILTER(WHERE mp.win_yn)::int win_count,COUNT(mp.match_player_id) FILTER(WHERE NOT mp.win_yn)::int loss_count,COALESCE(ROUND(COUNT(mp.match_player_id) FILTER(WHERE mp.win_yn)*100.0/NULLIF(COUNT(mp.match_player_id),0),1),0) inhouse_win_rate FROM member m LEFT JOIN inhouse_match_player mp ON mp.member_id=m.member_id
mapper.select: WHERE m.active_yn=true GROUP BY m.member_id ORDER BY m.real_name
WHERE m.active_yn=true AND m.member_id IN #{id} GROUP BY m.member_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE LOWER(game_name)=LOWER(#{gameName}) AND LOWER(tag_line)=LOWER(#{tagLine}) AND active_yn=true AND member_id!=#{excludeId}

SELECT m.real_name,m.game_name,m.tag_line,COUNT(*) match_count,COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE mp.win_yn) win_count,ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE mp.win_yn)*100.0/COUNT(*),1) win_rate FROM member m JOIN inhouse_match_player mp ON mp.member_id=m.member_id WHERE m.active_yn=true GROUP BY m.member_id HAVING COUNT(*)>=3 ORDER BY win_rate DESC,match_count DESC LIMIT 3
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM member_champion_stat WHERE member_id=#{memberId} AND stat_scope='SOLO_RECENT'
mapper.select: SELECT champion_name,games,wins,rank_no,ROUND(wins*100.0/NULLIF(games,0),1) win_rate FROM member_champion_stat WHERE member_id=#{memberId} AND stat_scope='SOLO_RECENT' ORDER BY rank_no

SELECT champion_name,COUNT(*) games,COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE win_yn) wins,ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE win_yn)*100.0/COUNT(*),1) win_rate FROM inhouse_match_player WHERE member_id=#{memberId} AND COALESCE(champion_name,'')!='' GROUP BY champion_name ORDER BY games DESC,wins DESC LIMIT 3

WITH mine AS (SELECT match_id,team_code,win_yn FROM inhouse_match_player WHERE member_id=#{memberId}) SELECT m.member_id,m.real_name,COUNT(*) games,COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE p.win_yn) wins,ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE p.win_yn)*100.0/COUNT(*),1) win_rate FROM mine x JOIN inhouse_match_player p ON p.match_id=x.match_id AND p.team_code=x.team_code AND p.member_id!=#{memberId} JOIN member m ON m.member_id=p.member_id GROUP BY m.member_id,m.real_name HAVING COUNT(*)>=2 ORDER BY win_rate DESC,games DESC

SELECT im.match_id,im.played_at,im.winner_team,p.team_code,p.position_code,p.champion_name,p.kills,p.deaths,p.assists,p.win_yn,p.mvp_yn FROM inhouse_match_player p JOIN inhouse_match im ON im.match_id=p.match_id WHERE p.member_id=#{memberId} ORDER BY im.played_at DESC LIMIT 5
